spec_match.rationale: Implements the literal chromestatus-cited scenario: TOC sidebar + content concurrent smooth scrolls.

interactive.rationale: TOC entries fire both scrolls at once.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb is the literal chromestatus quote — match is perfect.

edge_cases.rationale: No probe distinguishing pre-130 cancellation; no rapid-click test.

openQuestions.title: Add a pre-130 simulator toggle
openQuestions.detail: Await first scrollend before issuing second, showing the old serialised behaviour for contrast.
